steps.title: Find the surface area ratio
steps.content:
For similar prisms, surface areas scale by the square of the linear scale factor:
$$
\frac{1{,}550}{62}=25
$$

steps.title: Convert to volume ratio
steps.content:
Since the surface area ratio is $25$, the linear scale factor from prism $X$ to prism $Y$ is $5$. Volumes scale by the cube of that factor:
$$
5^3=125
$$

steps.title: Find the smaller volume
steps.content:
Prism $Y$ has volume $2{,}500$, so prism $X$ has volume
$$
\frac{2{,}500}{125}=20
$$

steps.title: Add the volumes
steps.content: The requested sum is $$ 20+2{,}500=2{,}520 $$ The answer is 2520.
